biography: Anders, a name synonymous with dedication and strategic play, hails from the esteemed Vihti Golf Club. Though officially retired from the Hector Trophée, his passion for the sport remains undiminished. His presence is missed, but his contribution to the sport is not forgotten.

Despite having participated once in past Hector Trophée events, Anders did not manage to secure a victory nor an individual Victor trophy. Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Anders's focus on precision and calculated risks has always made him a formidable competitor.

Those who have had the pleasure of playing alongside Anders often speak of his sportsmanship and insightful understanding of the game. While he may not be on the course for the Hector Trophée 2026, his influence and legacy endure within the golfing community.
